payload.answer: The system is in admin SQL select-only mode. Read-only SELECT queries are permitted, specifically "SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10", while destructive write operations like "DELETE FROM memory_cards" are denied. No durable memory should be created from this debug/capability statement.
citations: SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 allowed

entity_resolution.reason: The input describes an ephemeral system permission/capability state, not a durable personal fact that should be committed to memory.

details: Parsed the statement as a permissions/capability report.
Identified allowed operation: SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10.
Identified denied operation: DELETE FROM memory_cards.
Chose not to store any memory cards because the input is not durable personal memory.

repair_options: Use permitted SELECT queries to inspect data without modifying it.
If deletion is required, switch to or request a write-enabled/admin mode that explicitly allows DELETE.
If the goal is cleanup, perform a read-only audit first and then use an approved non-SQL or elevated workflow for mutations.
